summary: Tested new features for Trend Syria app: 1) Selling type buttons (piece/weight) with educational tips 2) Direct upload button 3) Seller phone for driver 4) Seller not found button. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 401 for driver user - may need investigation

critical_code_review_comments: Console error: 'Error fetching image settings: TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' - minor issue in FoodStoreDashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) AddProductModal has sellingType state with 'بالقطعة' and 'بالوزن' buttons + educational tips 2) FoodStoreDashboard ProductModal has same features 3) Backend seller-not-found endpoint works 4) seller_phone saved in product order items 5) store_phone saved in food orders. Driver features (call seller, seller not found buttons) only appear when driver has active orders.
